name: California Veggie Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf frozen honey wheat bread dough, thawed
1 yellow bell pepper, in 1/8 inch strips
1 tablespoon fresh basil, in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 450°F.
2. Spray cookie sheets with Pam.
3. Sprinkle evenly with cornmeal.
4. Divide dough into thirds.
5. Press or roll each portion into a 7-inch circle.
6. Place on coated cookie sheets.
7. Prick crusts generously with fork.
8. Bake at 450°F for 8 minutes. (If crusts puff during baking, flatten slightly with spoon).
9. Meanwhile, bring water to a boil in nonstick medium skillet.
10. Add broccoli, bell pepper, onion, and garlic. Return to a boil.
11. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer until vegetables are crisp-tender, 3-4 minutes.
12. Set aside.
13. Top each partially baked crust with 1/3 of the tomatoes.
14. Arrange vegetable mixture evenly over tomatoes.
15. Top with basil and cheese.
16. Bake at 450°F for an additional 7-9 minutes or until cheese is melted and crusts are golden brown.
